mapper.sql: role_id AS "roleId", role_code AS "roleCode", role_name AS "roleName", description, enabled, created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"

menu_id AS "menuId", parent_id AS "parentId", menu_code AS "menuCode", menu_name AS "menuName", menu_type AS "menuType", route_path AS "routePath", component_key AS "componentKey", external_url AS "externalUrl", icon_key AS "iconKey", permission_code AS "permissionCode", display_order AS "displayOrder", visible, enabled, created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM rbac_role WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at, role_name
SELECT FROM rbac_role WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND role_id=#{roleId}
SELECT menu_id FROM role_menu WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND role_id=#{roleId} ORDER BY menu_id
mapper.update: UPDATE rbac_role SET role_code=#{roleCode},role_name=#{roleName},description=#{description},enabled=#{enabled},updated_at=#{now} WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND role_id=#{roleId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM rbac_role WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND role_id=#{roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_role WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND role_id=#{roleId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM role_menu WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND role_id=#{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_menu(tenant_id,role_id,menu_id,created_at) VALUES(#{tenantId},#{roleId},#{menuId},#{now}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM user_role WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND role_id=#{roleId}
SELECT FROM rbac_menu WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} ORDER BY display_order, menu_id
SELECT FROM rbac_menu WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND menu_id=#{menuId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rbac_menu WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND menu_id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE rbac_menu SET parent_id=#{parentId},menu_code=#{menuCode},menu_name=#{menuName},menu_type=#{menuType},route_path=#{routePath},component_key=#{componentKey},external_url=#{externalUrl},icon_key=#{iconKey},permission_code=#{permissionCode},display_order=#{displayOrder},visible=#{visible},enabled=#{enabled},updated_at=#{now} WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND menu_id=#{menuId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM rbac_menu WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND menu_id=#{menuId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rbac_menu WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND parent_id=#{menuId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role_menu WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND menu_id=#{menuId}
SELECT DISTINCT ur.user_id FROM role_menu rm JOIN user_role ur ON ur.tenant_id=rm.tenant_id AND ur.role_id=rm.role_id WHERE rm.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND rm.menu_id=#{menuId}
SELECT role_id FROM user_role WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY role_id
SELECT r.role_name FROM user_role ur JOIN rbac_role r ON r.tenant_id=ur.tenant_id AND r.role_id=ur.role_id WHERE ur.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND ur.user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY r.role_name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rbac_role WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND role_id IN #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_role WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_role(tenant_id,user_id,role_id,created_at) VALUES(#{tenantId},#{userId},#{roleId},#{now}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user u WHERE u.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND u.enabled=TRUE AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM (VALUES ('users:manage'),('roles:manage'),('menus:manage')) required(permission_code) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_role ur JOIN rbac_role r ON r.tenant_id=ur.tenant_id AND r.role_id=ur.role_id AND r.enabled=TRUE JOIN role_menu rm ON rm.tenant_id=r.tenant_id AND rm.role_id=r.role_id JOIN rbac_menu m ON m.tenant_id=rm.tenant_id AND m.menu_id=rm.menu_id AND m.enabled=TRUE WHERE ur.tenant_id=u.tenant_id AND ur.user_id=u.user_id AND m.permission_code=required.permission_code ) )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM permission_definition WHERE permission_code=#{permissionCode}
